# DMR Documentation
> Dynamic MPI Reconfiguration library by the Barcelona Supercomputing Center.

Source: https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc

## Pages

- [dmr.h](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/api/dmr-h/)
- [Policy API summary](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/api/dmr-policies-h/)
- [Distributed Dataset](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/examples/distributed-dataset/)
- [Hello World](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/examples/hello-world/)
- [MiniDMR Local Cluster](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/docker-sandbox/)
- [MareNostrum 5 Manual Build](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/installation-mn5/)
- [Installation](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/installation/)
- [Local Quick Setup](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/local-setup/)
- [Modes of Operation](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/modes-of-operation/)
- [Applying DMR to Your Application](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/quick-start/)
- [What is DMR?](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/getting-started/what-is-dmr/)
- [References](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/references/)
- [Analytics](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/analytics/)
- [Application Structure](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/app-structure/)
- [Common Issues](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/common-issues/)
- [Configuration](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/configuration/)
- [Data Redistribution](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/data-redistribution/)
- [Built-in Policies](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/policies/builtin-policies/)
- [Custom Policy Logic](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/policies/custom-policies/)
- [Policy Configuration Reference](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/policies/legacy-migration/)
- [Overview](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/policies/overview/)
- [Runtime State Reference](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/policies/policy-context-reference/)
- [Reconfiguration Handling](https://iarejula-bsc.github.io/dmr_doc/user-guide/reconfiguration-handling/)
